title: Welcome to Automation
script: [Visual: futuristic city neon night] Welcome to the future of content creation. [Visual: typing on computer keyboard] With just a few lines of text, you can automate your entire channel.

title: The Future of Artificial Intelligence
script: [Visual: neural network brain] Artificial intelligence is transforming our world at an unprecedented pace. [Visual: robot helping human] From medicine to space exploration, the possibilities are truly endless. [Visual: stars galaxy] Join us as we explore what lies ahead in the next decade.
